mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_name = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT u.* FROM user u INNER JOIN user_info ui ON u.id = ui.user_id WHERE ui.email = #{email} AND u.deleted = 0 AND ui.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (third_account_id, user_name, password, login_type, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES ('', #{username}, #{password}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE session = #{session} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE deleted = 0
